title: Psychological Horror Modpack
description: A Fabric-based psychological horror modpack that focuses on atmosphere, sound design, and unsettling entities to create constant tension and paranoia rather than cheap jumpscares.
body:
Psychological Horror Modpack is a Fabric modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1 designed to create a disturbing and immersive horror experience focused on atmosphere, paranoia, and constant unease.

Instead of relying on traditional jumpscares, this modpack builds tension through environmental sounds, visual details, eerie entities, and unpredictable encounters. Mods like From The Fog, Nyctophobia, Cave Dweller, Deimos, and Whisperwoods make the world feel alive, hostile, and never truly safe.

Enhanced sound design, ambient effects, and subtle visual changes ensure that every cave, forest, and night exploration feels oppressive and unsettling. You are often watched, followed, or stalked — even when nothing seems to be there.

This modpack is ideal for players who enjoy slow-burn horror, exploration under pressure, and the feeling of being constantly observed. Headphones are highly recommended for the full experience.

Features:

Psychological and atmospheric horror

Dynamic and immersive sound design

Hostile and mysterious entities

Dark exploration-focused gameplay

Optimized for Fabric 1.20.1

Enter at your own risk. The world is listening.
